Recent Learning

Kafka Partition Rebalancing

Deep dive into consumer groups and rebalancing strategies

+

Key Learnings:

  • Consumer groups coordinate rebalancing via group coordinator
  • Stop-the-world rebalancing pauses message processing
  • Rebalance listeners trigger on onPartitionsRevoked/Assigned
  • Minimize rebalance time with session.timeout.ms tuning
Kafka Distributed Systems

gRPC Performance Optimization

Benchmarking and tuning for high-throughput services

+

Performance Insights:

  • HTTP/2 multiplexing reduces connection overhead by 80%+
  • Protocol Buffers binary format 3-10x faster than JSON
  • Connection pooling with keepalive prevents handshake latency
  • Message compression trade-off: CPU vs bandwidth
gRPC Go

Kubernetes Resource Limits & Requests

Understanding scheduler behavior and resource contention

+

Core Concepts:

  • Requests: scheduler uses these for placement decisions
  • Limits: enforced at runtime via cgroups (OOMKill if exceeded)
  • QoS classes: Guaranteed > Burstable > BestEffort
  • Memory overcommit causes pod evictions during pressure
Kubernetes Infrastructure

Architecture Decision Records

ADR-001: Microservices over Monolith

Accepted - Enables independent scaling and deployment

ADR-002: gRPC for Internal Communication

Accepted - High performance, strongly typed contracts
